name: acl
title: acl
description:
access control list - utilities
This package contains the getfacl and setfacl utilities needed for
manipulating access control lists. It also contains the chacl IRIX
compatible utility.

commands.name: chacl
commands.description: change the access control list of a file or directory

arguments.description: that there are two ACLs to change, the first is the file access ACL and the

arguments.description: Used to set only the default ACL of a directory.

arguments.description: Lists the access ACL and possibly the default ACL associated with the specified files
arguments.raw: -l  Lists the access ACL and possibly the default ACL associated with the specified files

arguments.description: Removes the file access ACL only.
arguments.raw: -R  Removes the file access ACL only.

use_cases: When you need Kali Linux, use chacl because access control list - utilities.
When the engagement is in the install phase, use chacl as a cataloged Kali Linux tool with operator ACCEPT/CANCEL gating.
When you need a concrete invocation, run `chacl acl pathname...` as documented upstream for chacl.
When you need a concrete invocation, run `chacl -b acl dacl pathname...` as documented upstream for chacl.
When you need a concrete invocation, run `chacl -d dacl pathname...` as documented upstream for chacl.
When you need a concrete invocation, run `chacl -R pathname...` as documented upstream for chacl.
When chaining Kali Linux tools, pair chacl with sibling catalog entries sharing its attack_surface/phase_hint.
When validating lab setup, run `chacl --help` (or the README entrypoint) and confirm required hardware/deps from the catalog.

documentation.readme: chacl - change the access control list of a file or directory
documentation.how_to_use: Install/setup: sudo apt install acl. Run the primary entrypoint as shown in upstream docs, e.g. `chacl acl pathname...`. Further invocations from upstream: `chacl -b acl dacl pathname...`; `chacl -d dacl pathname...`.
documentation.when_to_use: Use during the 'install' phase against surfaces [local] in the Kali Linux category. Fits when the engagement needs: access control list - utilities.
documentation.why_to_use: Prefer this tool based on upstream description: chacl - change the access control list of a file or directory.
usage_sections: Install with: sudo apt install acl
